description: Discover unparalleled luxury in this stunning 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom modern family home, nestled in the heart of Sandton's most prestigious suburb, Sandhurst. Spanning 350m², this residence is designed for sophisticated living and grand-scale entertaining. The open-plan living areas flow seamlessly onto a covered patio overlooking a sparkling swimming pool and a meticulously landscaped 1200m² garden. The gourmet kitchen is a chef's dream, and the home includes two secure garages. Located within a secure estate, you are just moments away from Sandton City, offering world-class shopping and dining.

Experience coastal living at its finest in this luxurious 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offering breathtaking, uninterrupted sea views. Located on the sought-after Ocean View Drive, this 180m² residence is moments from the famous Sea Point Promenade, trendy restaurants, and boutique shops. The spacious open-plan living area leads onto a large balcony, perfect for watching sunsets. The building offers 24/7 security and two underground parking bays for your convenience and peace of mind.

This chic and modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment is a stone's throw from the iconic Umhlanga beach. Spanning 125m², it offers a perfect investment for holiday letting or as a permanent seaside residence. The complex features a stunning communal pool area, a fully-equipped gym, and enjoys direct access to the beach path. Enjoy the vibrant lifestyle of Umhlanga Rocks, with world-class dining and shopping just a short walk away.

An exquisite 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom villa set on a 5000m² stand within a working wine farm in the picturesque Devon Valley. This 500m² home offers unparalleled privacy, luxury, and panoramic views of the vineyards and mountains. The property boasts its own private vineyard, a temperature-controlled wine cellar, an infinity pool that melts into the landscape, and even a helipad for the ultimate convenience. This is a rare opportunity to own a piece of paradise in the heart of the Cape Winelands.

Nestled in the lush greenery of Constantia Upper, this beautiful 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom family home offers tranquility and space. The 280m² house is set on a large 2500m² plot with a mature, irrigated garden fed by a borehole. Enjoy stunning mountain views from the covered patio, which is perfect for outdoor dining. The property offers a peaceful retreat while being close to top schools, wine farms, and shopping centres.

address: 55 Silver Lakes, Silver Lakes Golf Estate
description: This spacious 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom home in the secure Silver Lakes Golf Estate is ideal for families who enjoy an active lifestyle. The 310m² home features generous living areas that open onto a patio and garden. Residents enjoy access to the pristine golf course, a clubhouse with restaurants, tennis courts, and walking trails in a secure, 24/7 guarded environment. It's a complete lifestyle offering in the heart of Pretoria East.

A charming and immaculately maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home in the quiet, family-friendly neighbourhood of Aurora, Durbanville. This 220m² house is set on an 850m² plot with a beautiful, established garden and a dedicated braai area for entertaining. Located on a quiet street, it offers a peaceful environment while being conveniently close to excellent schools, shopping centres, and the Durbanville wine route.

Live in the cultural heart of Johannesburg in this trendy 90m² loft apartment. Located in the vibrant Maboneng Precinct, this 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom space features high ceilings, industrial-chic finishes, and large windows with city views. The building has a popular rooftop bar, and you'll be surrounded by art galleries, independent cinemas, eclectic restaurants, and unique retail stores. It's the ultimate urban living experience.

A stylish 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the bustling city centre on the famous Bree Street. This 100m² unit offers modern finishes and fantastic city views. Enjoy the convenience of secure parking and being within walking distance of Cape Town's best shops, award-winning restaurants, and vibrant nightlife. Perfect for a young professional or as a high-demand rental investment.

This elegant 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhouse is located within the prestigious Simbithi Eco Estate. The 250m² home offers a unique lifestyle surrounded by nature, with numerous walking trails, dams for catch-and-release fishing, and top-tier community centres. The estate is a sanctuary for wildlife and offers a secure and serene environment for your family. A double garage provides ample parking and storage.

A magnificent 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home in South Africa's gourmet capital, Franschhoek. This 400m² property is perfect for entertaining, featuring a state-of-the-art chef's kitchen, a large walk-in wine cellar, and beautiful outdoor spaces. The property also includes a separate guest cottage, ideal for visitors or as an income-generating rental. Located just off the main road, you are steps away from world-famous restaurants and art galleries.

An architectural masterpiece offering unrivaled luxury and space in the premier Waterfall Equestrian Estate. This 600m² home, set on a 1-hectare stand, features 5 en-suite bedrooms, a private cinema, and full smart home automation. The estate offers world-class equestrian facilities, extensive walking trails, and exceptional security, providing a country lifestyle with urban convenience.

Modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment located in the heart of Green Point. This 110m² unit offers views of the Cape Town Stadium and is just a short walk from the V&A Waterfront and Green Point Urban Park. The building features a communal gym and secure parking. Enjoy the ultimate urban lifestyle with cafes, restaurants, and shops right on your doorstep.

Experience exclusive island living in this unique 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom waterfront home on Thesen Islands. This 320m² property offers a relaxed lifestyle with its own private jetty and direct access to the Knysna lagoon's canals. The estate boasts top-tier security, beautiful walking paths, and is a short boat ride or walk from the bustling Knysna Waterfront with its shops and restaurants.

A grand 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom family residence set on a large 2000m² stand in a sought-after, boomed-off area of Bryanston. This 450m² home features spacious living areas, a private tennis court, a large swimming pool, and a borehole. The property also includes staff quarters and multiple garages. It's an ideal home for a large family looking for space, security, and a prime location.

Indulge in luxurious living in this 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhouse on the world-class Erinvale Golf Estate. The 280m² home offers spectacular mountain views and a tranquil lifestyle. Residents benefit from golf membership, access to a luxury spa, and multiple dining options within the estate, all set against the backdrop of the Helderberg mountains.

Executive 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the heart of the Rosebank business and shopping district. This 95m² unit in The Tyrwhitt offers the ultimate convenience with a concierge service, standby generator, and direct access to the Rosebank Mall and the Gautrain station. It's the perfect 'lock-up-and-go' for busy professionals.

A beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom coastal home in Voelklip, perfect for whale watching. This 240m² residence offers a relaxed atmosphere with sea views and is located just a short stroll from the famous cliff paths and pristine beaches. The open-plan living area leads to a deck, ideal for enjoying the ocean breeze. It's the quintessential Hermanus lifestyle home.

An entertainer's dream, this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom villa offers dramatic ocean and mountain views in glamorous Camps Bay. Spanning 550m², this home is the epitome of Cape Town luxury, featuring a stunning infinity pool, spectacular sunset views from every level, a private home cinema, and a glass elevator for easy access. Live the high life, just minutes from the famous Camps Bay strip and beaches.

Live, work, and play in the exclusive Melrose Arch precinct. This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offers ultimate convenience and style in a secure, European-style piazza setting. Enjoy the integrated living experience with high-end retail, fine dining, and cafes all just a few steps from your front door. The precinct offers 24/7 security for complete peace of mind.

Experience sophisticated living in this 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home in Val de Vie, South Africa's top residential estate. This 480m² property offers a lifestyle of wellness and security, with polo fields, lakes, vineyards, and a world-class wellness centre on your doorstep. The home itself features premium finishes, spacious living areas, and a beautiful garden with a pool. This is secure, luxury living at its best.

A charming 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse in the secure Cedar Lakes lifestyle estate. The 190m² home has a private garden and is perfect for a young family. The estate is built around a series of lakes and offers fantastic amenities, including a clubhouse with a restaurant and pool, tennis courts, and catch-and-release fishing dams. Enjoy a country feel with the convenience of Fourways Mall nearby.

Live on one of the world's most acclaimed golf resorts. This 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home on the Fancourt Estate offers a life of luxury on the beautiful Garden Route. The 420m² home has views of the course and mountains. Residents enjoy access to three championship golf courses, a world-class spa, multiple restaurants, and leisure facilities, all within a highly secure environment.

Creative 1-bedroom loft apartment in a converted factory, located in the heart of Cape Town's vibrant design district, Woodstock. This 75m² space features industrial-chic elements like exposed brick and high ceilings. You'll be right next to the famous Old Biscuit Mill, home to the Neighbourgoods Market and top-rated restaurants. It's the perfect spot for a creative professional seeking an inspiring urban space.
features: Next to Old Biscuit Mill Market

description: Perched on Linksfield Ridge, this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom home offers exceptional luxury and panoramic views over Johannesburg. The 520m² residence is designed for entertaining, with spacious living areas, a home bar, and an indoor swimming pool. The property provides high security in a prestigious, boomed-off area, offering a tranquil and safe environment with some of the best views in the city.

The ultimate beach house, this 6-bedroom, 6-bathroom home offers direct access to the famous Robberg Beach. Spanning 650m², this magnificent property is designed for seaside living, with multiple decks, a swimming pool, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Wake up to the sound of the ocean and enjoy unparalleled views. This is a rare opportunity to own a frontline property in one of South Africa's most desirable holiday destinations.

Experience high-rise luxury living in this 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment at Crystal Towers. Residents enjoy access to hotel amenities including a world-class spa, multiple restaurants, and an indoor/outdoor pool. The apartment offers stunning views and is connected via a bridge to the Canal Walk Shopping Centre. This is sophisticated, convenient living in the heart of Century City.

A beautiful 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom home on the shores of Hartbeespoort Dam. Located in the prestigious Pecanwood Estate, this 340m² property is perfect as a permanent residence or a weekend getaway. It features stunning dam views, a private garden, and access to a boating club and the Jack Nicklaus signature golf course. Enjoy a resort lifestyle just an hour from Johannesburg and Pretoria.

This large 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom family home is set in the tranquil Scott Estate in Hout Bay. Spanning 430m² on a 1600m² plot, the property offers beautiful mountain views, a large garden with a pool, and a separate cottage perfect for guests or rental income. Enjoy the peaceful, community-oriented lifestyle of Hout Bay, with its beautiful beach, harbour, and markets.

An exclusive 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom residence within the world-renowned Zimbali Coastal Resort. This 580m² villa offers a life of luxury and privacy, with beautiful forest views from its expansive entertainment deck and private pool. Residents have access to the resort's pristine beaches, golf course, spa, and multiple swimming pools, all within a pristine, natural environment.

Modern 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse in the secure Featherbrooke Estate, located at the foot of the Roodekrans Ridge. The 260m² home offers spacious living and a private garden. The estate provides a safe environment with a clubhouse, sports facilities, and walking trails through a nature reserve, offering a peaceful retreat from city life.

A stylish and convenient 1-bedroom lock-up-and-go apartment in the business hub of Sandton. This 60m² unit at The Capital offers hotel-style living with a concierge, on-site restaurant, pool, and gym. It's the perfect address for a corporate professional looking for luxury, security, and convenience, just minutes from the Sandton CBD and Gautrain station.

This magnificent 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom beachfront home offers the iconic, postcard view of Table Mountain and Robben Island. Located on the Bloubergstrand beachfront, a world-famous kite-surfing hotspot, this 380m² residence provides a lifestyle second to none. Enjoy spectacular sunsets from your patio and direct access to the white sandy beaches. This is a dream home for any ocean lover.

An incredible 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom home offering luxury living within a vast, 700-hectare eco estate. This 700m² home provides space, nature, and tranquility, with free-roaming game on your doorstep. The estate features hiking and biking trails, high security, and a peaceful atmosphere, all while being conveniently close to the city. It's the perfect blend of bushveld living and urban convenience.

Spectacular 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom penthouse living at The Regent in Morningside. This 200m² apartment combines hotel-style luxury with residential comfort, offering spectacular views over Sandton. Residents enjoy access to a rooftop pool, a private spa, concierge services, and high-end security, providing a lifestyle of ultimate luxury and convenience.

An elegant and secure 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhouse in Waterkloof Ridge, one of Pretoria's most affluent and secure suburbs. This 280m² home features a private garden, modern finishes, and is located in a highly secure complex. Known as an embassy suburb, Waterkloof offers a tranquil environment with easy access to top schools, shopping, and the Pretoria Country Club.

address: Hen and Chicken Estate, Claremont Upper
description: A classic 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom family home in the prestigious Hen and Chicken Estate of Claremont Upper. This 360m² home is set on a 1050m² plot with an established garden and pool. It's the perfect family home, located in the catchment area for Cape Town's top schools and a short drive from the University of Cape Town and Cavendish Square mall.

Modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the redeveloped Durban Point Waterfront. This 120m² unit offers stunning canal and harbour views. The area provides a unique lifestyle with waterfront promenades, restaurants, and close proximity to uShaka Marine World. The building is highly secure, offering peace of mind in this vibrant, up-and-coming precinct.

A trendy, renovated 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home in the heart of Parkhurst. This charming 210m² house retains its classic features like pressed ceilings while offering modern comforts. Located just a short stroll from the famous 4th Avenue, you can enjoy the vibrant village atmosphere with its popular restaurants, antique shops, and boutiques.

An opulent 5-bedroom, 6-bathroom villa in one of Africa's most exclusive, wind-free locations. This 750m² architectural marvel in Bantry Bay offers unparalleled, panoramic sea views. Luxury features include a home cinema, a fully-equipped gym, a glass elevator servicing all floors, and an infinity pool that seems to merge with the Atlantic Ocean. This is an exceptional property for the discerning buyer.

A tranquil 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home on the KZN South Coast, offering a perfect blend of golf and beach living. This 400m² home is set within a lush, tropical garden and offers sea views. Located within the Southbroom Golf Estate, you have direct access to the golf course and are just minutes from pristine beaches and the local village.

Luxury 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom New York-style apartment at the prestigious One Hyde Park address. This 150m² unit features premium finishes and access to exclusive lifestyle amenities, including a fine-dining restaurant, a state-of-the-art gym, a swimming pool, and a concierge service. It offers a world-class living experience in a prime location between Sandton and Rosebank.

An exclusive 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom cluster home in a highly secure complex in the prestigious suburb of Hyde Park. This 300m² home offers luxury, privacy, and security. It features a private pool and garden, modern interiors, and is located just minutes from Hyde Park Corner and Sandton City, offering the best in high-end shopping and dining.

A magnificent 6-bedroom, 7-bathroom ambassadorial residence set on a one-acre estate in prestigious Bishopscourt. This 1000m² home offers breathtaking views of Table Mountain's eastern slopes. The property features a floodlit tennis court, a large swimming pool, a separate guest house, a library, and a wine cellar. This is one of Cape Town's finest homes, offering ultimate privacy and luxury.

Modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in The Polofields lifestyle estate in Waterfall. The 110m² unit comes with high-end SMEG appliances. The estate offers world-class facilities, including a Lifestyle Centre with a Camelot Spa, a private cinema, a La-Pizzeria, and a swimming pool. Enjoy resort-style living with the convenience of being in the Waterfall City precinct.

A relaxed 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home on the beautiful Langebaan Country Estate. Perfect for nature lovers and outdoor enthusiasts, this 250m² home offers a peaceful West Coast lifestyle. The estate features a stunning golf course, access to the Langebaan lagoon for water sports, and beautiful fynbos trails for walking and cycling. It's a secure and tranquil environment for all ages.

A beautiful country-style 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom family home in the sought-after Cornwall Hill Country Estate. The 450m² house is set on large grounds and offers a wholesome, country lifestyle with the convenience of having access to a top private school within the estate. Enjoy the peace and quiet of the countryside with easy access to both Johannesburg and Pretoria.

Secure 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse in Fernwood Estate, nestled at the foot of Table Mountain. This 220m² home offers stunning mountain views and is located moments from the world-famous Kirstenbosch Botanical Gardens and the University of Cape Town. The secure complex provides a safe and peaceful environment in one of Cape Town's most desirable suburbs.

Experience vibrant urban living in this 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in SA's first green city precinct, Menlyn Maine. This 100m² unit offers a rooftop swimming pool and sundeck, with high-end retail, a casino, and numerous dining options at your fingertips. It’s a new-age city living experience with unparalleled convenience and a focus on sustainability.

An iconic 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom bungalow situated directly on Clifton's world-famous 4th Beach. This is a rare and exclusive opportunity to own a piece of paradise. The 400m² home offers an unrivaled lifestyle with direct beach access, incredible privacy, and the most spectacular sunset views imaginable. This is more than a home; it's a legacy.
